encounter.discharge_destination: Usual place of residence with safety-net advice

encounter_summary: Uncomplicated acute diverticulitis: Two days of constant left lower-quadrant pain, altered bowel habit and low-grade fever. Conservative management with fluids, analgesia, diet progression and observation. Symptoms and inflammatory markers improve; outpatient follow-up and safety-netting arranged.

Clinical impression: Diverticular disease of large intestine without perforation or abscess.
CT demonstrates sigmoid diverticular inflammation without perforation, collection or abscess.
